hero.title: Bring Your Menu to the Digital World in Seconds
hero.subtitle: Stop paying for complex software. Create your own QR menu and update the content whenever you want.

generator.title: Enter Your Menu Link
generator.description: Paste your Google Drive or website link, and generate your QR code instantly.
generator.emptyHint: QR will appear here when you enter a link
generator.driveHelpDesc: After uploading your PDF to Drive, Right-Click -> Share -> Copy Link, but make sure to select 'Anyone with the link' first.

scanner.title: Test Your QR Code
scanner.description: Instantly test your created or existing QR code using your camera through the browser.
scanner.scanLine: Align the QR code within the camera frame.

bento.title: Free Dynamic Menu Hack with Google Drive
bento.subtitle: No more expensive menu software. Combine Google Drive and QR technology to manage your business professionally.

step1.title: Design Your Menu
step1.desc: Prepare your menu with our built-in tool and select 'Save as PDF' to download.

step2.title: Upload to Drive (Free)
step2.desc: Drag the file to Drive. IMPORTANT: Right-Click -> Share and make sure to select 'Anyone with the link' before copying.

step3.title: Dynamic QR Hack
step3.desc: Don't delete the file. Use 'Manage Versions' to update. Your printed QR codes stay valid forever!

step4.title: Instant Access
step4.desc: Your customers can reach your menu in seconds.

step5.title: Mobile Friendly
step5.desc: Drive links look perfect on every device.

caseStudy.title: Case Study: Coffee Joy Restaurant
caseStudy.quote: We used to print hundreds of menus every time prices changed. Since switching to Drive + QR, our costs have dropped to zero.
caseStudy.author: Ahmet Yılmaz

home.howItWorksDesc: No complex systems. Design your menu, download as PDF, and create your QR code instantly with your Drive link.
home.step1Desc: Add products and download as a stylish PDF.
home.step2Desc: Upload file and copy the public link.
home.step3Desc: Paste link and get your ready-to-use QR.

howItWorks.title: How It Works?
howItWorks.subtitle: Launch your digital menu in 3 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your menu with our tool and download as PDF.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload to Drive. Follow Right-Click -> Share -> Copy Link.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Paste the link and get your QR. Printed codes will never expire!
howItWorks.proTip: 💡 Tip: Use 'Manage Versions' to update without changing the QR!
howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Zero data, maximum speed. Build your menu, upload to the cloud, and use your table QR codes forever — without ever reprinting.

setupSteps.title: Build in the Studio
setupSteps.desc: Use Menu Studio to create categories, add items, set prices and upload photos. When ready, click 'Download PDF'.
setupSteps.detail: Free, no account, no data sharing.

setupSteps.title: Upload to Drive & Share
setupSteps.desc: Drag your PDF into Google Drive. Right-Click → Share → select 'Anyone with the link' and copy the URL.
setupSteps.detail: This step puts your menu on the internet.

setupSteps.title: Generate QR & Publish
setupSteps.desc: Paste the Drive link into the QR Generator page, download your QR code, and stick it on your tables. Done!
setupSteps.detail: Customers reach your menu in seconds.

howItWorks.phase2Desc: Did prices change? Added a new item? No need to reprint QR codes. Download a new PDF from Menu Studio and upload it over the old file on Drive.
phase2Steps: Open the Studio, make changes, download the PDF
Right-click the file on Drive → 'Manage versions'
Upload the new PDF — link stays the same, content changes
Table QR codes instantly show the updated menu ✨
howItWorks.phase2TipText: When you update a file using 'Manage Versions' on Google Drive, the file link never changes. So when a customer scans the old QR code, they always see your latest menu. No need to touch the codes on your tables!

features.title: Every Detail Considered
features.subtitle: Everything you need — from menu creation to QR management — under one roof. Free, no account, no data sharing.
features.f1Desc: Add categories and items, set prices and photos. Fill in details like spice level, calories, portion size and ingredients — all in one screen.
features.f2Desc: Did prices change? New item added? Just replace the file on Drive without touching the QR codes on your tables. Customers instantly see the updated menu.
features.f3Desc: No signup form, no email verification, no payment plan. Open the page, build your menu, close it. Data stays on your computer.
features.f4Desc: Download your designed menu as a print-ready PDF in one click. Categories, images, and prices in the right order — optimized for black & white printing.
features.f5Desc: Test the QR code you just created directly in the browser — no external app needed. Grant camera permission, point at the code, instantly verify it works.
features.f6Desc: Save all your menu data to a single .txt file. Open it on a different device or restore after accidentally closing — pick up exactly where you left off.

comparison.title: Compared to Classic Solutions
comparison.subtitle: No monthly fees, no account creation, no data sharing.

common.dataBrowserNote: Your data is kept locally during your browser session and is not saved to any server.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Your data is safe with us. We only use temporary state.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: This service is provided for free.

creator.importHint: Select the .txt backup file from your computer
creator.empty: You haven't added anything to the menu yet. Start with the 'New Category' button on the left!

nextSteps.smartDesc: When prices change, download the new PDF and upload it over the same file on Drive (replace file).
nextSteps.smartResult: Your menu updates instantly without changing the QR codes on the tables! ✨

setupSteps.d: Save your menu in a professional format.
Upload the file to Drive and set it to 'Anyone can view'.
Copy the Drive link and paste it into our QR Generator.
